articles.title: Being alone vs feeling lonely: At 60, Salman Khan shares one life lesson - 'Alone is by choice and lonely...'
articles.description: On Sunday (May 17), Salman Khan shared a shirtless picture and a thoughtful message about being alone versus feeling lonely. He is also preparing for his upcoming war drama, Maatrubhumi: May War Rest in Peace. The actor reportedly underwent a significant fitness transformation for the physically demanding role. The film, previously titled Battle of Galwan, has undergone changes in its production and title. Read on!

articles.title: Who is Jinnytty? South Korean Twitch streamer leaves fans horrified after late-night hotel stalker scare
articles.description: South Korean Twitch streamer Jinnytty sparked global concern after livestreaming a terrifying ordeal from a hotel in Poland during her Wobblethon cycling challenge. The streamer allegedly barricaded herself inside her room after a stalker tracked her location and attempted to approach her hotel. Fans praised her bravery and Polish streamer Mokrysuchar’s quick response. The incident also reignited major discussions online about streamer safety, privacy risks, and dangers faced by female creators during real-time broadcasts.

articles.title: “Numbers don’t lie, but feelings do”: Cardi B dragged online as fans compare Stefon Diggs’ net worth to Offset’s
articles.description: Cardi B and Stefon Diggs sparked major online debate after viral rumors claimed the rapper may have forgiven the NFL star despite cheating allegations. Social media users began comparing Diggs’ reported net worth to Offset’s, with some accusing Cardi of treating the two men differently because of money. Critics labeled her a “gold digger,” while others defended her, arguing that relationships are more complex than internet speculation and financial comparisons.

articles.title: ACM Awards 2026 Winners: Ella Langley sweeps seven trophies, Cody Johnson named Entertainer of the Year; check full list here
articles.description: The ACM Awards 2026 returned to Las Vegas with Shania Twain hosting. Ella Langley was a dominant force, winning seven awards including Female Artist of the Year. Cody Johnson took home Entertainer of the Year and Male Artist of the Year, capping off a night of significant country music achievements.

articles.title: "How low is her self esteem": Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce accused of chasing attention after repeated NYC sightings
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce sparked massive online debate after being spotted together for a second straight night in New York City. While many fans praised the couple’s chemistry, style, and public affection, others accused them of chasing attention with repeated public outings. Social media reactions ranged from supportive comments calling them “absolutely gorgeous humans” to harsh criticism labeling the appearances “PR walks.” Kelce’s outfit also became a viral talking point online.

articles.title: Big B drops video of ancient Hindu Vishnu temple in Iran, netizens thank him
articles.description: Amitabh Bachchan shared an Instagram video highlighting the historic Bandar Abbas Vishnu Temple in Iran, built in 1892 for Indian Hindu traders. This post illuminated a lesser-known Indo-Iranian historical connection, showcasing the significant role of Indian merchants in the region during the 19th century.

He said he has met special forces and secret services personnel as part of his immersion in their world.

articles.description: Director Park Chan-wook received the Commandeur, the highest rank of the Ordre des Arts et des Lettres, recognising his global contributions to cinema. He joined distinguished Korean artists previously honoured with this prestigious award.

articles.title: MrBeast fires back after viral podcast claim says his YouTube channel views suddenly dropped by 50 percent
articles.description: MrBeast responded after online claims said his YouTube views dropped by 50%. He explained that people were comparing years-old videos with newer uploads. The creator said his older videos continue gaining millions of views every month. Despite the debate, MrBeast remains YouTube’s most-followed individual creator, and his recent videos still attract tens of millions of viewers quickly.

He admitted a misstep with 'Thugs of Hindostan,' where focusing on his character backfired. Khan explained the film's script was altered significantly due to casting changes, leading to its eventual failure, a outcome he anticipated.
